The species is further grouped under the subfamily Epidendroideae, a subfamily of orchids characterized by their sympodial growth habit. Additionally, Trichosalpinx notosibirica can be found within the tribe Cymbidieae, a tribe of orchids known for their showy flowers and often elongated sepals. This classification helps to identify the specific characteristics and relationships of the species within the orchid family.
